title: ESG Analyst
description: Analyze ESG metrics, build sustainability dashboards, support reporting, and work with climate and energy stakeholders to improve decision making.

title: Climate Research Analyst
description: Lead climate research, synthesize market insights, create Power BI views, and support senior teams on decarbonization strategy.

title: Energy Market Analyst
description: Build data analysis workflows for renewable energy markets, financial modeling, SQL reporting, and stakeholder updates.

title: Sustainability Associate
description: Support ESG reporting and sustainability initiatives. Coordinate internal stakeholders and prepare client-ready reporting packs.
